content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of NNN elements and a positive integer MMM such that 1≤Ai≤N1 \leq A_i \leq N1≤Ai​≤N.

You can perform the following operation on AAA:


Select **at most** MMM elements of AAA and increase all of the selected elements by 111.
constraints: 1 ≤ N ≤ 5·10^5 (sum of N over all test cases ≤ 5·10^5)
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Each test case consists of two lines. The first line contains two integers N and M — the size of the array and the maximum number of elements that can be selected in one operation. The second line contains N space‑separated integers A1, A2, …, AN.
content.outputFormat: For each test case output a single integer on its own line — the minimum number of operations required to make all array elements equal.

sampleTestCases.explanation: For each test case we compute the maximum element, sum the differences to that maximum, and divide by M rounding up. The results are 2, 2, 1 and 0 respectively.

solution.approach: Let maxVal be the maximum element of the array. Every element smaller than maxVal must be increased until it reaches maxVal. The total number of unit increments required is total = Σ (maxVal - Ai). In one operation we can increase at most M elements by 1, i.e., we can perform at most M unit increments per operation. Therefore the minimum number of operations is ceil(total / M) = (total + M - 1) / M. The algorithm for each test case: 1) read N, M and the array; 2) find maxVal; 3) compute total = Σ (maxVal - Ai); 4) answer = (total + M - 1) / M. This runs in O(N) time per test case and O(1) extra space.
solution.timeComplexity: O(N) per test case, O(ΣN) over all test cases.

code.Python3:
import sys

def main():
    data = sys.stdin.read().strip().split()
    if not data:
        return
    it = iter(data)
    T = int(next(it))
    out = []
    for _ in range(T):
        N = int(next(it)); M = int(next(it))
        arr = [int(next(it)) for _ in range(N)]
        max_val = max(arr)
        total = sum(max_val - x for x in arr)
        ans = (total + M - 1) // M
        out.append(str(ans))
    sys.stdout.write('\n'.join(out))

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
